mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE rqst_id = #{userId} AND board_type LIKE 'MYPAGE_%INQUIRY%'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE rqst_id = #{userId} AND board_type LIKE 'MYPAGE_%NOTIFICATION%'
SELECT CAST(rqst_no AS VARCHAR) AS id, title, board_type AS type, TO_CHAR(ins_dt, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS date FROM board WHERE rqst_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ins_dt DESC LIMIT 5
